label.description: canonical label, snake_case, English (for example: cellular, macromolecular)

scheme.description: the stratification scheme this stratum belongs to; strata are comparable only within a scheme

ordinal.description: position within the scheme; STRICTLY LOWER IS FINER-GRAINED; need not be contiguous

unit.description: the principal unit of analysis at this stratum (for example: cell, synapse, region)

governs.description: the governing frameworks or bodies of law at this stratum (for example: quantum_mechanics, cell_biology)
